framework.reasoning: Paper explicitly uses SQLite/FTS5, sentence-transformers, and LLM API calls — no neural training loop, no GPU requirement. Pure Python orchestration system.

retrieval_forward_pass.description: Multi-view retrieval for a single query
pseudocode: INPUT: query q (str), config theta
1. bm25_results = BM25.search(q, top_k=theta.keyword_top_k)  → List[(MemoryUnit, score)]
2. sem_results = cosine_search(embed(q), embeddings, top_k=theta.semantic_top_k)  → List[(MemoryUnit, score)]
3. str_results = entity_filter(extract_entities(q), store, top_k=theta.structured_top_k)  → List[(MemoryUnit, score)]
4. if enable_entity_swap: swap_results = BM25+sem search on q_stripped of person names
5. if enable_query_decomposition: sub_results = union over RRF(sub-query retrievals)
6. fused = fuse([bm25, sem, str], mode=theta.fusion_mode, weights=[w_kw, w_sem, w_str])
7. scored = fused_score + lambda_iota*importance + lambda_r*recency + reinforcement
8. ranked = sort by scored DESC, take top theta.max_context
OUTPUT: List[MemoryUnit] (len <= max_context)
INPUT: qa_pairs Q, initial config theta_0, memory store K
f_star = 0; theta_star = theta_0
FOR r in 0..Rmax:
predictions = [answer(q, K, theta_r) for q,y* in Q]
f_r = mean([token_f1(pred, ref) for pred, (q,ref) in zip(predictions, Q)])
write raw_log L_r to raw_results_{r}.jsonl
delta_theta = diagnosis_llm.analyze(L_r, theta_r)
IF f_{r-1} - f_r > tau_rev: theta_{r+1} = theta_star  # revert
ELIF |f_r - f_{r-1}| < epsilon for 2 rounds: theta_{r+1} = perturb(theta_r)  # explore
ELSE: theta_{r+1} = clamp(theta_r + delta_theta)  # apply
IF diagnosis detects missing keywords: K += targeted_extract(S, missing_keywords)
IF f_r > f_star: f_star = f_r; theta_star = theta_r
IF f_r - f_{r-1} < epsilon: BREAK
OUTPUT: theta_star

evolution.ASSUMED_rrf_k: Standard default; paper does not specify

rationale.openai/anthropic: LLM API calls for extraction, answer gen, diagnosis

entrypoints.description: Ingest conversation sessions into memory store
Run self-evolution loop on QA set

docker_spec.notes: No GPU required — all operations are CPU-only per Appendix E

risk_assessment.description: Final ranking formula includes importance and recency weights with no default values given
risk_assessment.mitigation: Default to 1.0 with config flag; make swappable

risk_assessment.description: Answer verification trigger condition depends on undefined threshold
risk_assessment.mitigation: Default 0.5; expose as config param; use 'Unknown'/'not specified' class detection as primary trigger

risk_assessment.description: Retry count for failed LLM extraction calls not given
RRF formula requires k but paper omits it
Quality of self-evolution depends critically on the diagnosis prompt. Paper provides the full prompt in Appendix F but it is highly benchmark-specific and tuned.
risk_assessment.mitigation: Implement Appendix F prompts verbatim; provide config override for custom prompts

risk_assessment.description: Both benchmarks are publicly available per Appendix E
risk_assessment.mitigation: Include download scripts; provide mock data for unit tests
